heroTitle: Your LinkedIn profile is the first thing people see. Right now it might be sending them away.
heroDesc: I help coaches, consultants, and founders build a LinkedIn presence that attracts the right people and moves them toward a conversation — without posting every day and hoping for the best.
problemHeading: Here is what most LinkedIn profiles are doing wrong.
problemBody:
Your headline does not say who you help. Your about section talks about you instead of your reader. Your featured section is empty or points nowhere. And your content is too broad to make anyone feel like you are speaking directly to them.

None of this is your fault. Nobody sat you down and showed you how a LinkedIn profile is supposed to work as a system. They just told you to post more.

mainItems.title: Foundation
mainItems.body: We start with your positioning. Who you help, what problem you solve, and what makes you different. This becomes the backbone of everything on your profile.

mainItems.title: Profile Build
mainItems.body: We rewrite the five most important sections of your LinkedIn profile. Headline, About, Banner brief, Featured section strategy, and Services section. Every word is written to speak directly to your ideal client.

mainItems.title: Content System
mainItems.body: Using the Equity Flywheel Content System, we build your content plan so you always know what to post, who you are posting for, and how each piece leads someone closer to working with you.

resultsHeading: What this looks like when it works.
results: 10x newsletter growth for Coin Bureau through a complete content system rebuild.
$300,000 inbound pipeline for an EdTech founder in 90 days starting from 300 followers.
60% drop in client acquisition cost for Zedsource after a full brand and LinkedIn rebuild.
ctaHeadline: Want to know exactly what needs fixing on your LinkedIn?
ctaSubtext: Book a free 30-minute call and we will walk through your profile, your content, and what to do next.
